channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Google’s new gradient icon design is coming to more apps
item.description: In late 2025, Google started rolling out new icons with a gradient design. Now it seems the new look is coming to the rest of Google's apps. 9to5Google got its hands on images of the new icons that ditch the uniform circle design that tries to cram in every color of the Google logo. In […]

item.title: Canadian premier wants to ban social media and AI chatbots for kids in Manitoba
item.description: Manitoba could be the first province in Canada to establish a social media ban for kids, but the proposal's details aren't very clear yet. The province's premier, Wab Kinew, announced during a fundraiser event on Saturday and on X that Manitoba would put in place a ban for social media and AI chatbots for its youth. "They're doing these very awful things to kids all in the name of a few likes, all in the name of more engagement, and all in the name of money," Kinew said at the event. "Our kids will never be for sale and their attention and their childhoods should never be profited from." Kinew...

item.title: Stop the financial bleed! How Orbit fights back against the dreaded 'Subscription Creep'
item.description: Homescreen Heroes: Orbit helps you track your subscriptions like a pro

item.title: Cette table purifie l’air et recharge votre smartphone : j’ai testé la SwitchBot Air Purifier Table
item.description: Le SwitchBot Air Purifier Table est un objet assez iconoclaste, qui se propose de purifier votre air, avec un focus particulier sur les animaux, au format table. La marque y ajoute une veilleuse, la charge par induction et même un diffuseur d’huiles essentielles. Voici notre test de cette table pas comme les autres.

item.title: Amazon divise par 3 le prix de sa petite caméra de surveillance qui filme en 360°
item.description: Compacte et discrète, la caméra Blink Mini Pan-Tilt est la solution parfaite pour surveiller son logement sans se ruiner. Vendue autour de 59 euros, elle tombe aujourd’hui à seulement 19 euros, une promo qui la rend particulièrement intéressante.

item.title: Trump has terminated several members of the independent National Science Board
item.description: As reported by several outlets, the Trump administration dismissed members of the National Science Board (NSB), which is tasked with establishing policies for the National Science Foundation. It's not clear how many members have been dismissed. According to screenshots shared with The Washington Post, board members received a message that their position was "terminated, effective immediately. The NSB establishes policies for the National Science Foundation (NSF), the independent US agency responsible for apportioning about 25 percent of federal support towards research conducted by the country...
